description: Playfully teach kids about their emotions and discover where LOVE lives! The perfect storybook addition to any home, preschool, library, or Calming Corner, Heart’s Treasure Hunt is a beautifully-illustrated, hardcover book for children ages 0 to 6+. In this get-up-and-move story full of engaging, play-based, social-emotional learning activities for kids, our friend Heart wants to know, “What is Love, and where does Love live?”Our curious friend Heart sets out on a treasure hunt to find his answer, asking seven animal friends with diverse experiences of their own for their thoughts. In the end, Heart discovers that love means MANY things. Most importantly, Heart learns that love lives in every one of us even when we are feeling different emotions like happy, sad, calm, mad, and even scared. The last page of the book has a mirror for children can see themselves as they read the take-home message and final line of the book, “You are love. Yes, it’s true! Love, love, love… Love is YOU!”. Ideal for strong-willed toddlers or young children who are acting out due to challenges or a delay in their ability to express their feelings because they are young or diagnosed with ADHD, Autism, and/or SPD.This book includes mindfulness-building activities to help children feel more at ease and focused on the present moment, using all their senses to develop an awareness of themselves and the world around them.
